iron_sword.name: Iron Sword
iron_sword.description: A sturdy blade forged of iron.

steel_longsword.name: Steel Longsword
steel_longsword.description: A well-crafted blade of tempered steel.

wooden_staff.name: Wooden Staff
wooden_staff.description: A simple wooden staff, useful for walking and whacking.

oak_staff.name: Oak Staff
oak_staff.description: A sturdy oak staff, carved with simple protective symbols.

hunting_bow.name: Hunting Bow
hunting_bow.description: A simple bow for hunting game.

short_bow.name: Short Bow
short_bow.description: A compact bow, easy to carry.

longbow.name: Longbow
longbow.description: A powerful bow requiring great skill to draw.

throwing_knife.name: Throwing Knife
throwing_knife.description: A balanced knife designed for throwing.

iron_dagger.name: Iron Dagger
iron_dagger.description: A simple iron dagger, quick to strike.

iron_axe.name: Iron Axe
iron_axe.description: A heavy iron axe, good for chopping.

iron_mace.name: Iron Mace
iron_mace.description: A heavy iron mace for crushing blows.

wooden_spear.name: Wooden Spear
wooden_spear.description: A simple wooden spear with an iron tip.

wooden_shield.name: Wooden Shield
wooden_shield.description: A round wooden shield, basic protection.

iron_shield.name: Iron Shield
iron_shield.description: A sturdy iron shield with a boss.

chainmail.name: Chainmail
chainmail.description: Interlocking iron rings provide solid protection.

cloth_robe.name: Cloth Robe
cloth_robe.description: A simple robe, preferred by scholars.

iron_helmet.name: Iron Helmet
iron_helmet.description: An iron helmet with nose guard.

travelers_boots.name: Traveler's Boots
travelers_boots.description: Light boots made for long journeys.

travelers_amulet.name: Traveler's Amulet
travelers_amulet.description: A simple amulet blessed for safe travels.

bone_amulet.name: Bone Amulet
bone_amulet.description: A carved bone amulet inscribed with mantras.

lucky_charm.name: Lucky Charm
lucky_charm.description: A small charm said to bring good fortune.

prayer_beads.name: Prayer Beads
prayer_beads.description: Mala beads used for meditation and mantra recitation.

vajra_thunderbolt.name: Vajra Thunderbolt
vajra_thunderbolt.description: A diamond sceptre crackling with divine lightning. Symbol of indestructible truth.

yamas_ledger.name: Yama's Ledger
yamas_ledger.description: The book of judgment, recording every deed. Whispers karmic secrets to its bearer.

mantle_of_the_undying_flame.name: Mantle of the Undying Flame
mantle_of_the_undying_flame.description: Woven from perpetual embers, this robe burns without consuming. Fire cannot harm its wearer.

frozen_heart_amulet.name: Frozen Heart Amulet
frozen_heart_amulet.description: A sapphire heart encased in eternal ice. Slows the wearer's pulse, granting preternatural calm.

health_potion.name: Health Potion
health_potion.description: A red tincture that restores vitality.

mana_potion.name: Mana Potion
mana_potion.description: A shimmering blue elixir that restores magical energy.

greater_mana_potion.name: Greater Mana Potion
greater_mana_potion.description: A potent distillation of magical essence.

scroll_firebolt.name: Scroll of Firebolt
scroll_firebolt.description: A scroll inscribed with the Firebolt incantation. Usable by anyone.

scroll_lesser_heal.name: Scroll of Lesser Heal
scroll_lesser_heal.description: A scroll inscribed with a healing prayer. Usable by anyone.

scroll_magic_missile.name: Scroll of Magic Missile
scroll_magic_missile.description: A scroll of pure force. Usable by anyone.

scroll_voidbolt.name: Scroll of Voidbolt
scroll_voidbolt.description: A scroll imbued with space magic. The ink seems to shift when you're not looking at it.

scroll_shocking_grasp.name: Scroll of Shocking Grasp
scroll_shocking_grasp.description: A crackling scroll of air energy. Usable by anyone.

scroll_stone_spike.name: Scroll of Stone Spike
scroll_stone_spike.description: A heavy scroll dense with earth energy.

scroll_fireball.name: Scroll of Fireball
scroll_fireball.description: An AoE fire scroll. The paper is slightly warm to the touch.

scroll_blizzard.name: Scroll of Blizzard
scroll_blizzard.description: An AoE cold scroll that conjures a storm of ice.

scroll_chain_lightning.name: Scroll of Chain Lightning
scroll_chain_lightning.description: An AoE air scroll. Lightning arcs between enemies.

scroll_earthquake.name: Scroll of Earthquake
scroll_earthquake.description: A heavy earth scroll that shakes the ground. Damages all enemies.

scroll_bless.name: Scroll of Bless
scroll_bless.description: A buff scroll that raises combat effectiveness for several turns.

scroll_haste.name: Scroll of Haste
scroll_haste.description: Grants an extra action for several turns.

scroll_stone_skin.name: Scroll of Stone Skin
scroll_stone_skin.description: Hardens the skin like stone, granting temporary armor.

scroll_regeneration.name: Scroll of Regeneration
scroll_regeneration.description: A healing scroll that restores HP over several turns.

scroll_blink.name: Scroll of Blink
scroll_blink.description: A utility scroll that teleports the user a short distance.

scroll_cure.name: Scroll of Cure
scroll_cure.description: Removes a negative status effect. Usable by anyone.

scroll_dispel.name: Scroll of Dispel
scroll_dispel.description: Removes all magical buffs and debuffs from a target.

scroll_slow.name: Scroll of Slow
scroll_slow.description: Slows an enemy, halving its movement for several turns.

scroll_confusion.name: Scroll of Confusion
scroll_confusion.description: Causes an enemy to act erratically, attacking random targets.

white_charm_common.name: Common White Charm
white_charm_common.description: A blessed prayer bead. Reduces the mana cost of your next White magic spell.

white_charm_middling.name: Middling White Charm
white_charm_middling.description: A consecrated prayer bead of moderate power.

white_charm_rare.name: Rare White Charm
white_charm_rare.description: A sanctified relic that amplifies divine magic.

white_charm_unique.name: Unique White Charm
white_charm_unique.description: A sacred relic radiating divine light. Greatly empowers White magic.

fire_charm_common.name: Common Fire Charm
fire_charm_common.description: A smoldering ember charm. Reduces the mana cost of your next Fire spell.

fire_charm_middling.name: Middling Fire Charm
fire_charm_middling.description: A flickering ember charm of moderate intensity.

fire_charm_rare.name: Rare Fire Charm
fire_charm_rare.description: A blazing cinder that intensifies flame magic.

fire_charm_unique.name: Unique Fire Charm
fire_charm_unique.description: A shard of elemental flame. Vastly empowers Fire magic.

earth_charm_common.name: Common Earth Charm
earth_charm_common.description: A polished stone inscribed with earthen runes. Reduces the mana cost of your next Earth spell.

earth_charm_middling.name: Middling Earth Charm
earth_charm_middling.description: A dense geode fragment pulsing with earthen power.

earth_charm_rare.name: Rare Earth Charm
earth_charm_rare.description: A crystal of living stone that amplifies earth magic.

earth_charm_unique.name: Unique Earth Charm
earth_charm_unique.description: A fragment of the World Mountain. Vastly empowers Earth magic.

water_charm_common.name: Common Water Charm
water_charm_common.description: A vial of enchanted dew. Reduces the mana cost of your next Water spell.

air_charm_common.name: Common Air Charm
air_charm_common.description: A feather caught in a perpetual breeze. Reduces the mana cost of your next Air spell.

space_charm_common.name: Common Space Charm
space_charm_common.description: A shard of void crystal. Reduces the mana cost of your next Space spell.

black_charm_common.name: Common Black Charm
black_charm_common.description: A bone token etched with dark sigils. Reduces the mana cost of your next Black magic spell.

sorcery_charm_common.name: Common Sorcery Charm
sorcery_charm_common.description: A glass lens infused with raw magical force. Reduces the mana cost of your next Sorcery spell.

enchantment_charm_common.name: Common Enchantment Charm
enchantment_charm_common.description: A woven cord of binding thread. Reduces the mana cost of your next Enchantment spell.

summoning_charm_common.name: Common Summoning Charm
summoning_charm_common.description: A clay figurine of a spirit beast. Reduces the mana cost of your next Summoning spell.

ice_shard.name: Ice Shard
ice_shard.description: A shard of living ice that hums with power, gifted by the spirits of the frozen lake.

soul_stone.name: Soul Stone
soul_stone.description: A piece of turquoise left behind by a liberated spirit. Warm to the touch.

fire_resistance_talisman.name: Fire Resistance Talisman
fire_resistance_talisman.description: An old offering found near the lava guardian's passage. Grants some protection from flames.

good_iron_weapon.name: Good Iron Weapon
good_iron_weapon.description: A well-made iron weapon. When found, its type matches the bearer's best weapon skill.

good_iron_armor.name: Good Iron Armor
good_iron_armor.description: Sturdy iron armor left behind by the frozen army. Still in remarkable condition.

random_common_talisman.name: Carved Token
random_common_talisman.description: A small carved token pressed into your hands by a grateful soul.

fire_bomb.name: Fire Bomb
fire_bomb.description: An alchemical incendiary that explodes on impact.

poison_bomb.name: Poison Bomb
poison_bomb.description: A noxious cloud bomb that chokes everything in the area.

smoke_bomb.name: Smoke Bomb
smoke_bomb.description: A blinding smoke cloud. Affects all units in the area.

holy_water_bomb.name: Holy Water Bomb
holy_water_bomb.description: Consecrated water that scalds the unholy.

greater_fire_bomb.name: Greater Fire Bomb
greater_fire_bomb.description: A volatile alchemical explosive packed with concentrated flame powder.

acid_bomb.name: Acid Bomb
acid_bomb.description: A corrosive splash that eats through armor.

thunder_bomb.name: Thunder Bomb
thunder_bomb.description: A concussive blast that stuns those caught in the detonation.

flame_oil.name: Flame Oil
flame_oil.description: Coats a weapon with alchemical fire. Next 3 attacks deal bonus fire damage.

frost_oil.name: Frost Oil
frost_oil.description: Coats a weapon with bitter cold. Next 3 attacks deal bonus cold damage and may chill.

poison_oil.name: Poison Oil
poison_oil.description: A venomous coating that lingers on the blade. Next 4 attacks may poison the target.

holy_oil.name: Holy Oil
holy_oil.description: Blessed ointment that imbues a weapon with divine wrath.

whetstone_oil.name: Whetstone Oil
whetstone_oil.description: Hones a blade to razor sharpness. Next 3 attacks deal bonus damage with improved criticals.

paralyzing_oil.name: Paralyzing Oil
paralyzing_oil.description: A numbing toxin extracted from cave spiders. Attacks may stun the target.

warding_oil.name: Warding Oil
warding_oil.description: A shimmering oil that grants weapons the ability to pierce magical defenses. Next 3 attacks bypass magic resistance.

dragons_blood_oil.name: Dragon's Blood Oil
dragons_blood_oil.description: Rendered from dragonfire glands. Weapons coated in it burst into flame, and each wound fuels the wielder.

void_oil.name: Void Oil
void_oil.description: Distilled from extraplanar essence. Strikes from a voided blade silence spellcasters.

sovereign_oil.name: Sovereign Oil
sovereign_oil.description: The pinnacle of applied alchemy. Deals fire, frost, and void damage simultaneously, bypassing all resistances.

stamina_tonic.name: Stamina Tonic
stamina_tonic.description: A bracing brew that floods the body with energy. Restores stamina and delays fatigue.

cure_all.name: Cure-All
cure_all.description: A bitter draught that purges poison, disease, and curse alike.

elixir_of_vitality.name: Elixir of Vitality
elixir_of_vitality.description: A deep crimson elixir that surges through the blood. Heals massively and temporarily increases maximum HP.

elixir_of_power.name: Elixir of Power
elixir_of_power.description: A blazing golden elixir that ignites the mind. Restores mana fully and boosts spellpower for several turns.

panacea.name: Panacea
panacea.description: The alchemist's masterwork. Heals all wounds, purges all ailments, and restores body and mind to peak condition.

acid_flask.name: Acid Flask
acid_flask.description: A flask of corrosive alchemical acid. Dissolves armor on impact.

flashbang.name: Flashbang
flashbang.description: A blinding alchemical burst. Disorients all enemies in the area.

inferno_bomb.name: Inferno Bomb
inferno_bomb.description: An unstable alchemical charge that detonates in a massive fireball, leaving burning ground.

void_grenade.name: Void Grenade
void_grenade.description: Compressed extraplanar energy. On detonation, creates a spatial rift that disrupts all magic in the area.

plague_flask.name: Plague Flask
plague_flask.description: A biohazardous alchemical concoction. Spreads a fast-acting disease that jumps between enemies.

rations.name: Rations
rations.description: Dried meat and grain. Keeps the party fed on the road.

travel_provisions.name: Travel Provisions
travel_provisions.description: Prepared trail food for the road — cooked grain, dried fruit, cured meat.

herb_bundle.name: Herb Bundle
herb_bundle.description: Assorted medicinal herbs, roots, and dried flowers.

apothecary_pouch.name: Apothecary Pouch
apothecary_pouch.description: A leather pouch packed with carefully sorted remedies.

scrap_metal.name: Scrap Metal
scrap_metal.description: Bent nails, broken fittings, and salvageable metal scraps.

salvage_kit.name: Salvage Kit
salvage_kit.description: Usable metal, leather strips, and repair materials.

raw_reagents.name: Raw Reagents
raw_reagents.description: Mineral salts, dried fungi, and alchemical base compounds.

alchemists_pouch.name: Alchemist's Pouch
alchemists_pouch.description: A carefully prepared kit of distilled essences and reactive powders.

tsampa.name: Tsampa
tsampa.description: Roasted barley flour pressed into travel cakes. Staple of every Tibetan journey.

thukpa.name: Thukpa
thukpa.description: Hand-pulled noodles in dark broth. A full bowl, still warm.

sha_phaley.name: Sha Phaley
sha_phaley.description: Meat-filled bread, pan-fried and still warm. Someone left these in a hurry.

momo.name: Chilli Momo
momo.description: Steamed dumplings stuffed with spiced meat and chilli — someone's best effort at comfort in hell.

butter_tea.name: Butter Tea
butter_tea.description: Salt, yak butter, and strong tea in a wooden tube. Strange to outsiders, vital in the cold.

chang.name: Chang
chang.description: Fermented barley beer in a cracked gourd. More warming than nourishing.

dried_curd.name: Dried Curd
dried_curd.description: Hard yak cheese that takes long to eat and longer to digest. Keeps indefinitely.

khabse.name: Khabse
khabse.description: Fried dough twists, dense and sweet — festival food from a better life.

curry.name: Curry
curry.description: A sealed clay pot of spiced lentils and root vegetables. Heavy, filling, restorative.

tinmo.name: Tinmo
tinmo.description: Steamed spiral bread fresh off the pot. Dense and satisfying.

tulsi.name: Tulsi
tulsi.description: Holy basil, sacred to Vishnu. Purifies breath and blood. Grows even near the passes.

ashwagandha.name: Ashwagandha
ashwagandha.description: Withania root, dried and powdered. Steadies the humors under duress.

amalaki.name: Amalaki
amalaki.description: Dried Indian gooseberry — sour enough to water the eyes, rich in vital essence.

jatamansi.name: Jatamansi
jatamansi.description: Himalayan spikenard. Calms wind humor, aids rest in hostile terrain.

neem_bark.name: Neem Bark
neem_bark.description: Bitter and antiparasitic. You're not sure what lives in hell's water, but this helps.

saffron_pinch.name: Saffron
saffron_pinch.description: A generous pinch of saffron threads, wrapped in cloth. Rare and potent.

triphala.name: Triphala
triphala.description: The three fruits — amalaki, haritaki, bibhitaki — pressed into a single cake. A complete remedy.

guduchi.name: Guduchi
guduchi.description: Giloy stem, dried and powdered. Called 'the divine nectar' for its resilience.

shatavari.name: Shatavari
shatavari.description: Asparagus root from high altitude. Replenishes after exertion.

cinnabar.name: Cinnabar
cinnabar.description: Mercury sulfide, ground fine. Lurid red powder central to outer alchemy and Tibetan ritual medicine.

realgar.name: Realgar
realgar.description: Arsenic sulphide in orange crystal form. Toxic to demons and humans alike in sufficient quantity.

shilajit.name: Shilajit
shilajit.description: Mineral pitch seeping from hot rock. Rasayana tradition names it the destroyer of weakness.

lapis_powder.name: Lapis Powder
lapis_powder.description: Ground lapis lazuli, sky-blue and faintly bitter. Used in Tibetan art, medicine, and ritual.

datura_seed.name: Datura Seed
datura_seed.description: Jimsonweed. Potent in small doses, lethal in larger ones. A staple of dark alchemy.

soma_resin.name: Soma Resin
soma_resin.description: A gummy substance of uncertain origin. Smells of lightning and old ceremony.

swarna_bhasma.name: Swarna Bhasma
swarna_bhasma.description: Gold calcined through a hundred purifications. Rasayana medicine's most radiant offering.

hell_iron_shards.name: Hell-Iron Shards
hell_iron_shards.description: Fragments of demon-forged armor, still warm to the touch.

bone_fittings.name: Bone Fittings
bone_fittings.description: Pins, clasps, and rings carved from bone. Practical in their ugliness.

broken_manacles.name: Broken Manacles
broken_manacles.description: Shackles snapped by someone determined. The iron is dense and workable.

frost_steel_fragments.name: Frost-Steel Fragments
frost_steel_fragments.description: Plates of metal tempered by the cold hell's extremes. Harder and stranger than plain iron.

salvaged_chain.name: Salvaged Chain Links
salvaged_chain.description: Detached from a longer length. Someone was freed here, or escaped.

demon_nail_bundle.name: Demon Nails
demon_nail_bundle.description: Iron spikes shed from demonic hide. Sharp, pungent, and oddly workable.

dried_meat.name: Dried Meat
dried_meat.description: Strips of yak or unidentified flesh, salted and dried. Tough, but sustaining.

barley_grain.name: Barley Grain
barley_grain.description: A cloth pouch of raw barley. Needs cooking, but it keeps.

wild_apple.name: Wild Apple
wild_apple.description: Small, tart Himalayan apples. How they grow here is unclear.

turnip.name: Turnip
turnip.description: Hardy root vegetable. Unpleasant raw, edible cooked, reliable everywhere.

rice_portion.name: Rice
rice_portion.description: A knotted cloth of uncooked rice. Plain, but it fills the belly.

dal_bhat.name: Dal Bhat
dal_bhat.description: Lentil soup over rice — the meal that sustains half the Himalayas. Reliable and restorative.

khichdi.name: Khichdi
khichdi.description: Rice and lentils cooked down to a thick porridge. The universal comfort food.

meat_stew.name: Meat Stew
meat_stew.description: A heavy pot of slow-cooked meat and root vegetables. Smells better than it should down here.

chyawanprash.name: Chyawanprash
chyawanprash.description: The great Ayurvedic jam — amalaki, honey, ghee, and forty-seven herbs. Dark, sweet, medicinal.

brahmi_ghrita.name: Brahmi Ghrita
brahmi_ghrita.description: Brahmi herb clarified into ghee. A nerve tonic prized for clarity of mind and steadiness of hand.

mahasudarshana.name: Mahasudarshana
mahasudarshana.description: A Tibetan compound of fifty herbs. Named for the great discus — cuts through obstruction.

mercury_amalgam.name: Mercury Amalgam
mercury_amalgam.description: Processed quicksilver fixed with sulphur. Central to both Tibetan and Indian outer alchemy.

precious_pills.name: Precious Pills
precious_pills.description: Rinchen rilbu — Tibetan medicine's highest formulation. Gold, gems, and purified minerals compressed into small black pills.

copper_wire.name: Copper Wire
copper_wire.description: Thin copper wire stripped from a larger mechanism. Useful for binding and conducting.

cracked_bell_metal.name: Cracked Bell Metal
cracked_bell_metal.description: Fragment of a bronze ritual bell. The alloy is good; the tone is gone.

demon_plate_shard.name: Demon Plate Shard
demon_plate_shard.description: A palm-sized chunk of demonic chest armor. Heavy, dense, and faintly warm.

hellforge_ingot.name: Hellforge Ingot
hellforge_ingot.description: A rough ingot poured at one of the infernal forges. Still carries heat from the casting.

yoke_hardware.name: Yoke Hardware
yoke_hardware.description: Iron fittings from a broken cart yoke — rings, bolts, and a chain length.

bone_dagger.name: Bone Dagger
bone_dagger.description: A long bone sharpened to a point. Crude but quiet.

bone_sword.name: Bone Sword
bone_sword.description: A wide femur carved into a blade. Heavier than it looks, more fragile than it should be.

bone_club.name: Bone Club
bone_club.description: A knobbed bone swung like a mace. Not elegant, but it breaks things.

bone_spear.name: Bone Spear
bone_spear.description: A long bone lashed to a wooden shaft. Reach without refinement.

bronze_dagger.name: Bronze Dagger
bronze_dagger.description: A short bronze blade, double-edged. Standard traveller's sidearm.

bronze_axe.name: Bronze Axe
bronze_axe.description: A single-headed bronze axe. Splits wood and skulls with equal indifference.

bronze_mace.name: Bronze Mace
bronze_mace.description: A flanged bronze mace. Heavy on the back-swing, satisfying on contact.

bronze_spear.name: Bronze Spear
bronze_spear.description: A bronze-tipped spear with a hardwood haft. Reach and reliability.

obsidian_dagger.name: Obsidian Dagger
obsidian_dagger.description: Volcanic glass knapped to a razor edge. Cuts cleaner than anything this tier — but drop it and it shatters.

obsidian_blade.name: Obsidian Blade
obsidian_blade.description: A wide blade of chipped obsidian, mounted on bone. The edge is terrifying. The structural integrity is not.

obsidian_spear.name: Obsidian Spear
obsidian_spear.description: A hafted spear with a knapped obsidian head. Deadly on the thrust. Do not use it to parry.
